All right, welcome to the course on retention. It is going to be a blast. We're going to cover a lot of cool stuff. So let's dig into the overview. So what will this course cover? It will primarily be covering the five horsemen of retention. So those are number one, reach outs, number two, attendance tracking, number three, hand written cards, number four, member events, and number five, exit interviews. Those are going to be the five big lessons that we're going to be going over in this retention course. So we're also going to be covering the spreadsheets. We call them client tracking sheets that you'll be using to track all of these systems. Finally, we are going to cover the pro tips like organic marketing, Facebook post management, accountability coach roles, challenge nutrition FAQs, which you'll watch with your staff, and a whole management. So that is everything that will be included in this course. So without further ado, let's dive in.
